skills.description: Installation and repair of pipes, fixtures, fittings
Diagnostics and repair for split and window AC units
General woodwork, furniture repair and installation
Assembling flat-pack and complex furniture units
Chemical and non-chemical pest management services

categories.description: Leak fixing, fittings, and sanitary service work

services.description: Complete standard clean for up to 3BHK homes.
Deep cleaning for kitchen, bathrooms, and living areas.
Inspection and repair for common split AC faults.
Leak detection and repair for kitchen sink pipelines.
Expert assembly of all types of beds.
Repair and replacement of door locks and handles.
Treatment for cockroaches, ants, and other common pests.

how_it_works.step_description: The professional reviews room condition before starting.
Dusting, sweeping, mopping done area by area.
Quality check performed with customer.
Professional assesses deep cleaning requirement.
High-touch and difficult areas are deep cleaned.
Final sanitization and completion check.
Technician checks electrical and cooling issues.
Required components are repaired or replaced.
Post-repair cooling benchmark is verified.
Plumber traces source of the leak.
Faulty joints and fittings are corrected.
Post-fix flow and leak test are performed.
Professional unpacks the furniture components.
Bed frame and components are assembled as per manual.
Final check for stability and alignment.
Technician checks the faulty lock mechanism.
Internal components are repaired or the lock is replaced.
Smooth operation of the lock is verified.
Expert identifies pest hideouts and entry points.
Targeted gel or spray treatment is applied.
Post-treatment precautions and prevention tips.

serviceFaqs.question: How long does a standard clean take?
Do I need to provide any cleaning materials?
serviceFaqs.answer: No, the professional carries standard supplies and tools.

serviceFaqs.question: Is gas refill included in AC repair?
serviceFaqs.answer: Gas refill is charged separately if required after diagnosis.

serviceFaqs.question: Can this service fix concealed pipe leakage?
serviceFaqs.answer: Only exposed and accessible leak points are covered.

serviceFaqs.question: How long does bed assembly take?
serviceFaqs.answer: Typically 1.5 to 2 hours depending on complexity.

serviceFaqs.question: Do you provide the new lock?
serviceFaqs.answer: No, hardware cost is separate. We can help buy it if needed.

serviceFaqs.question: Is the pest control safe for kids?
serviceFaqs.answer: Yes, we use government-approved safe chemicals.

reviews.comment: Quick diagnosis and clean AC repair. Very professional.
Leak issue resolved fully, no rework needed.
Service quality was good and on-time completion.
AC is running well, arrived on time.
Manoj was excellent, no leaks at all after the fix.
